svg.title: Before and after skill management across five harnesses
svg.desc: Before: Codex CLI, Claude Code, Cursor, OpenCode, and OpenClaw each hold independent skill copies with version drift. After: a single managed inventory holds the canonical copy and each harness symlinks in.
svg.text: Each harness keeps its own copies — versions drift
One canonical copy per skill — harnesses symlink in
Update once, every harness gets it
